title: iranecio davisii
intro: Iranecio davisii, also known as Davis's Irani, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Iranecio davisii include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Iranecio davisii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
